description_long: This is a front-loading washing machine with a rectangular, boxy shape and a predominantly white exterior. The front features a large circular door with a transparent window, a control panel with a rotary dial, several buttons, and a detergent drawer. The sides are plain with vertical indentations for structural reinforcement, while the back has a service panel and a flexible drainage hose. The machine appears to be constructed mainly from metal with some plastic components, and the door is slightly ajar, revealing a dark interior. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for residential or utility room placement in an urban environment.
description: A white, front-loading washing machine with a circular door, control panel, and drainage hose, featuring a sturdy, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plain white panel with vertical indentations and the edge of the open circular door.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the service panel, drainage hose, and a generally flat, unadorned surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with vertical indentations and a partial view of the door.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the circular front-loading door, control panel with dial and buttons, and detergent drawer.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located at the top front of the machine, featuring a rotary dial on the right, several rectangular buttons in the center, and a detergent drawer on the left. The panel is simple and horizontally arranged.
attribute_door_type: Front-loading, circular door with a transparent window, made of plastic and glass, featuring a visible handle for pulling open.
attribute_detergent_drawer_location: The detergent drawer is visible on the upper left side of the front control panel, designed as a pull-out compartment.
